zh.lifeSummary: 當Josserande de la Flotte於1110年出生在法國哈倫-易費利額時，她的父親Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte36歲，母親Adelaide DE COMPS36歲。她於1129年與Bertrand I of Forcalquier結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1151年5月20日之後在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Josserande de la Flotte于1110年出生在法国哈倫-易費利額时，她的父亲Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte36岁，母亲Adelaide DE COMPS36岁。她于1129年与Bertrand I of Forcalquier结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1151年5月20日之后在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Flotte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Breton   Flot  .
French (Flotté): topographic name derived from the Old French verb floter ‘to irrigate’.
French: habitational name from a place called (La) Flotte.

variants.name: Flot
meanings: Americanized form of German   Flott  .
Breton: variant of Flao, a nickname from flaw ‘scatterbrained, illogical, sluggish, fearful’.
French: topographic name from Old French flot ‘uncultivated and abandoned land’, also ‘country road’.

nameMeanings.name: Josserande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Henri, Pierre.
French: from an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements gaut, an ethnic name meaning ‘Goth’ or ‘Geat’ (see Goss ) + hramn ‘crow’.

variants.name: Goss
meanings: Short form of   Jocelyn  , also occasionally used as an independent given name. In part it may also be a revival of a medieval boy's name (  see  Joyce  ). The name is borne by the British actor  Joss Ackland  (  b. 1928 ) and the female pop singer  Joss Stone  (  b. 1987 ) as Jocelyn Eve Stoker.

en.lifeSummary: When Josserande de la Flotte was born in 1110, in Charente-Inférieure, France, her father, Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte, was 36 and her mother, Adelaide DE COMPS, was 36. She married Bertrand I of Forcalquier in 1129. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 20 May 1151, in Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Josserande de la Flotte est née en 1110, à Charente-Inférieure, France, son père, Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adelaide DE COMPS, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Bertrand I of Forcalquier en 1129. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 20 mai 1151, à Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Josserande de la Flotte 1110 in Charente-Inférieure, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte 36 und ihre Mutter Adelaide DE COMPS 36. Sie hat 1129 Bertrand I of Forcalquier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 20. Mai 1151 in Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Josserande de la Flotte è nata il nel 1110 nel Charente-Inférieure, Francia, sua padre, Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Adelaide DE COMPS, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Bertrand I of Forcalquier nel 1129. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 20 maggio 1151, nel Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Josserande de la Flotteが1110年にフランスチャーエンテ-インフeリーウアで生まれた時，父Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotteは36歳，母Adelaide DE COMPSは36歳であった。1129年にBertrand I of Forcalquierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1151年5月20日以後にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエンテ-マリティメで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Josserande de la Flotte(이)가 1110년 프랑스 처테-인프e리우르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide DE COMPS(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1129년 Bertrand I of Forcalquier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1151년 5월 20일 이후 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처테-마이팀에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Josserande de la Flotte nasceu em 1110, em Charente-Inférieure, França, seu pai, Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide DE COMPS, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Bertrand I of Forcalquier em 1129. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 20 de maio de 1151, em Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Josserande de la Flotte родилась в 1110 г. в местности чаренте-инфeриеур, Франция, её отцу по имени Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide DE COMPS, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bertrand I of Forcalquier в 1129 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 20 май 1151 г. в местности чаренте-маритим, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Josserande de la Flotte nació en 1110, en Charente-Inférieure, Francia, su papá, Arnaud II Lambert De La Flotte, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adelaide DE COMPS, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Bertrand I of Forcalquier en 1129. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 20 de mayo de 1151, en Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
